pin-action-sha.description: All external marketplace actions must be pinned to an immutable full-length commit SHA rather than tags or branches.

coverity-scan.description: Coverity SAST and secrets scanning should be configured for repository code.

image-build-jfrog.description: Workflow must configure building and pushing Docker images to the JFrog Artifactory registry.

image-signing.description: Container images pushed to JFrog registry must be signed using Cosign.

bdba-scan.description: Black Duck Binary Analysis (BDBA) vulnerability scans should execute on container images pulled from the JFrog registry.

residual-gitlab-vars.description: Workflows must not contain legacy GitLab CI variables (e.g., $CI_PROJECT_NAME, $CI_COMMIT_SHA) inside shell steps.

explicit-artifact-transfer.description: Dependent jobs (defined in needs) requiring compiled outputs must use explicit actions/upload-artifact and actions/download-artifact steps.

unbound-secrets.description: Passwords, keys, or tokens used in shell scripts must be bound to env properties referencing secrets.<NAME>.

runner-shell-misalignment.description: Jobs targetting Windows runner environments must specify 'shell: bash' for Linux/bash commands.

multiline-block-scalar.description: Multi-line run commands should use literal block scalars (|) rather than folded block scalars (>).

job-dependency-cycle.description: Circular dependency definitions in job 'needs' trees are forbidden.

least-privilege-token.description: Limit GITHUB_TOKEN scope by setting 'permissions: {}' at the top-level workflow or job configuration.

concurrency-control.description: Configure concurrency groups on deployment or state-modifying pipelines to avoid execution collisions.
